channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NASCAR issues rule changes regarding waivers, damaged vehicles, and an open spot for elite drivers
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Hello Helio and welcome to the Daytona 500. Four-time Indianapolis 500 winner Helio Castroneves claimed one of the four open spots in the season-opening Daytona 500 as part of a slew of rule changes NASCAR announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chicago Public Schools paid $390K on do-not-hire sports officials
item.description: Chicago Public Schools paid $390,000 to at least 36 people who were on a do-not-hire list to officiate sporting events.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Former LSU receiver Kyren Lacy is being investigated in connection with a fatal auto wreck
item.description: Former LSU receiver Kyren Lacy is under investigation by Louisiana State Police in connection with a vehicle accident in December that killed a 78-year-old man in Lafourche Parish.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lakers coach JJ Redick confirms his family's home was lost in the Pacific Palisades fire
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Los Angeles Lakers head coach JJ Redick has confirmed his family lost its home in the raging wildfire in Pacific Palisades earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles QB Jalen Hurts clears concussion protocol and will start wild-card game against Green Bay
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Out of NFL concussion protocol, Jalen Hurts is ready to roll for the Eagles. With Hurts back, the NFC East champion Eagles (14-3) should be close to full strength in the starting lineup for their NFC wild-card game Sunday against Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Latest NFL season highlights financial risks for sports betting companies when so many favorites win
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It’s been a tough football season for sports books. FanDuel and its key rival DraftKings have both showed investors that the house can indeed lose, or at least lose more than anticipated.
item.dc:creator: DAMIAN J. TROISE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Suns and their Big 3 are struggling. There aren't many easy solutions to their problems
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — The Phoenix Suns currently employ one of the best scorers in NBA history, a four-time All-Star, a three-time All-Star, a coach who has won a championship and several veteran, accomplished role players. And for the past two months, they've basically been terrible.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: All-Bay Area News Group 2024 high school football team
item.description: Hundreds of players throughout the region honored by high school staff at Mercury News, East Bay Times.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, Nathan Canilao, Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Giants players 'surprised' Brian Daboll was retained following woeful season: report
item.description: Multiple New York Giants players were "surprised" that head coach Brian Daboll was retained for another season following a woeful 3-14 season, according to a report from ESPN.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prep roundup: Moreau Catholic heats up after halftime to beat Washington-Fremont
item.description: Moreau Catholic outscores Washington 27-9 in third quarter. Bishop O'Dowd needs two OTs to turn back Castro Valley. Piedmont girls roll past San Leandro. Westmont girls edge Prospect in OT.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lefkow, Correspondent, The Mercury News

item.title: Women’s rights groups call on Donald Trump to demand NCAA change trans athlete policies
item.description: A coalition of women's advocacy organizations has sent a letter to President-elect Donald Trump to demand the NCAA change its transgender athlete policies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Penn State QB Drew Allar's late interception helps seal Notre Dame's win in Orange Bowl
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Drew Allar walked to the Penn State sideline with his hands on the top of his head, seemingly aware of where the College Football Playoff semifinal was heading.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Basketball: Men get first RMAC win under Dunlap as Women cruise past NMHU
item.description: After a three-week break, Colorado Mesa Basketball is back. And they're off to a great start in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Mets great David Wright offers advice to Pete Alonso as the first baseman remains unsigned in free agency
item.description: New York Mets great David Wright gave advice to free agent first basemen Pete Alonso during a press conference about Wright having his jersey number retired Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Comedian Shane Gillis says Nick Saban ‘spazzed on me’ after ESPN on-air appearance
item.description: Shane Gillis, the famous comedian, revealed that legendary college football coach Nick Saban "spazzed on me" after making jokes that he had cheated while at Alabama.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU's 14-game home winning streak ends, 72-67
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team has hit a rough patch at the start of Big 12 Conference play. The Cougars made just 5 of 23 three-point attempts in a 72-67 loss at home to Texas Tech Tuesday night. That ended a 14-game winning streak for BYU at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Kessler celebrating girlfriend's Miss America title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler has played basketball in front of thousands of fans for the Utah Jazz. But he couldn't have been more stressed Sunday night when his girlfriend, Miss Alabama Abbie Stockard, was a finalist for Miss America.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Bulls plan to retire Derrick Rose's jersey next season
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Derrick Rose wasn't sure how he will feel when sees his No. 1 hanging from the rafters. He was still trying to process the news. The Chicago Bulls announced Saturday they plan to retire Rose's jersey sometime next season.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Soderblom stops 38 shots as Blackhawks end 5-game skid with 4-2 win over Canadiens
item.description: Arvid Soderblom made 38 saves, Nick Foligno scored twice and the Chicago Blackhawks snapped a five-game slide with a 4-2 win over the Montreal Canadiens on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CMU Women's wrestling thrives under Coach Mercado's leadership
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa University women’s wrestling coach Travis Mercado expressed gratitude for his team’s commitment and drive to succeed. “I’m just grateful to have a group of young ladies that I trust and who trust me,” Mercado said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Naval Base San Diego basketball introduces two teams
item.description: The Naval Base San Diego basketball team is led by LaQuan Hansley, the former Triton player-turned-head coach, who revived the program after it was shut down during the COVID-19 pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5
